title: Update CLI /pay and /receive to support --chain flag
description: Add --chain zcash|monero option to /pay command in cli/src/commands.rs. For Chain::Monero: Bob generates subaddress via MoneroKeys and sends it in PaymentAction::Address; Alice prints address and says 'send XMR manually' (sending stub). Update /receive to show Monero primary address when --chain monero is active.
close_reason: CLI /pay chains without Zcash wallet, /receive monero added, dispatch_payment handles Monero address gen and manual-send flow
